items.name: grave salt
items.description: Salt scraped from a consecrated threshold. Tempting to spend on a ward now, or to keep for the grave-work it makes possible later.

items.name: twist of quicklime ash
items.description: Caustic white ash folded in waxed paper. It cleans a wound, unmakes a stain, or eats a written truth.

items.name: packet of iron filings
items.spellBias: iron, binding, disruption of the uncanny
items.description: Bright filings that leap toward a lodestone. Cast for warding lines or kept to spoil someone else's enchantment.

items.name: skein of spider silk
items.description: A skein of grey silk stronger than it looks. It snares a spell or sutures a wound with equal patience.

items.name: bloodroot bulb
items.description: A red-veined bulb that bleeds when cut. A tonic in small doses, a threat in a spell.

items.name: vial of crushed glass
items.description: Glittering dust that catches every lamp. It scatters light into a spell or scatters trust across a floor.

items.name: cake of dark tallow
items.description: Rendered tallow pressed into a cake. Seals a letter, feeds a flame, or fixes a promise in warm wax.

items.name: scraping of verdigris
items.description: Blue-green corrosion scraped from old copper. It ages a thing, sickens a body, or greens a spell with time.

items.name: bead of amber resin
items.description: A warm bead with a insect caught mid-flight. Holds a moment still, whether in a spell or on a shelf.

items.name: handful of bone char
items.description: Black char ground from old bone. It filters a poison, darkens a line, or lends a spell a graveyard's patience.

items.name: lodestone shard
items.description: A dull shard that drags iron toward it. It points a way, pulls a thing, or anchors a wandering spell.

items.name: twist of saltpetre
items.description: Crystals that hiss in flame. A dangerous temptation to spend loudly and a dangerous thing to carry quietly.
